verses.2: for they call themselves citizens of the holy city,
verses.3: I have declared the former things from of old.
verses.4: Because I knew that you are obstinate,
verses.5: therefore I have declared it to you from of old;
verses.7: They are created now, and not from of old.
verses.9: For my name’s sake, I will defer my anger,
verses.13: Yes, my hand has laid the foundation of the earth,
verses.14: “Assemble yourselves, all of you, and hear!
verses.16: “Come near to me and hear this:
verses.18: Oh that you had listened to my commandments!
verses.19: Your offspring also would have been as the sand
verses.21: They didn’t thirst when he led them through the deserts.
verses.22: “There is no peace”, says the LORD, “for the wicked.”
